steps.title: Find the professor's counterargument
steps.content: The professor directly rebuts the students' reaction. The students found the novel old-fashioned; the professor counters that it addresses issues that still matter today. This contradiction reveals what the blank must capture.

steps.title: Match the rebuttal to the choices
steps.content: B presents the novel as more relevant to contemporary audiences than apparent at first—capturing the professor's counter-claim to the students' dismissal. The other choices either compare it to other 1980s novels, argue about readability, or mistake the optional structure for a required method. That matches choice B — B is correct.
